message:
fix(grpc): restore load-bearing lock atomicity in health watcher

A linter tightened the lock scopes in watched_status_and_version(),
breaking the atomicity guarantee that was the entire point of the
function. The two RwLock read guards must be held simultaneously so
that a concurrent set_status() cannot interleave between the status
read and the version read.

Restored explicit guard bindings with #[allow(clippy::significant_drop_tightening)]
and a CORRECTNESS comment explaining why the scopes must not be tightened.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
